steps.title: Locate the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept is where the graph crosses the vertical axis. That happens when the input, the number of months since purchase, is $0$.

steps.title: Interpret the starting value
steps.content:
At $x=0$, the graph shows a value of $250$ dollars. That represents the bike's estimated value when it was purchased.
The answer is A.
